# Rhythms of Truth: A Jazz-Poet's Reflections,*Created: Monday, December 11, 2023 at 8:36:31?PM*<div><h2>Rhythms of Truth: A Jazz-Poet's Reflections,</h2><h2><br></h2></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"/><br></div>
<div>8:35 PM á Dec 11, 2023<br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><h2>In the heart's cafe, where the espresso drips like a metronome, my soul writes the score. The melody? It's the truth that swings from my core. </h2><h2>#JazzSoul</h2><h2> </h2><h2>#WritersLife</h2><h2> </h2><h2><br></h2></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Let's talk, you and I, in verses that weave through the steam, where the truth is the guest and the conversation, the dream. #Conversationalist #HeartToHeart <br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Through my own truth, a path winds Đ it's a journey deep and wide. Along these notes, my experiences ride. #PersonalJourney #LifeLines <br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Sweet melancholy, in this cup of life Đ it's bitter, it's warm, a sip of the divine strife. #MelancholicMelody #LifeInAJazzTune <br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Gifted with the rhythm of the night, my words are the jazz of the soul, the writer's delight. #JazzLyrics #PoeticSoul <br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><br></div>
<div>Can you feel the song, a heart's rhythm in the silent gaze? It's the spark in the eye, life's abstract maze. #Heartbeat #AbstractLife <br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><br></div>
<div>Life, oh life, you're a canvas so vast. At times you're a breeze, at others, a blast. What's up is within, in the spaces we chart. #LifeCanvas #MusingAloud <br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><br></div>
<div>In every beat, in every bar, find the truth that's uniquely ours. As the record spins, let's embrace it all Đ the easy flow, the hard falls. #TruthInMusic #LifeSpins <br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><br></div>
<div>Let's keep the conversation alive, let it thrive. In the jazz of life, we swing, we jive. Share your verse, your truth, your spark Đ in this cafŽ of life, we make our mark. #KeepSwinging #LifeInJazz <br></div>
